header.location: Portland, OR (Open to Remote or Relocation)

summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Talent & People Program Manager who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing processes grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can make talent operations run like a well-oiled machine—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.
